items.fallback: 历史bug已修复：此前 /api/resource-task/create/ 依赖 Celery broker，broker 不可达时 paper 任务会卡在排队中；现已改为本地异步线程启动并支持论文图像检测开关/子任务勾选

items.title: Persist paper and review results in dedicated tables while keeping compatibility
items.verification: conda run -n detect python manage.py migrate; conda run -n detect python manage.py test core.tests; conda run -n detect python manage.py check
items.fallback: Keep DetectionTask.text_detection_results as a compatibility mirror while dedicated PaperDetectionResult/ReviewDetectionResult tables become the primary runtime read path.

items.title: Normalize status payloads and report generation across image, paper, and review tasks
items.verification: conda run -n detect python manage.py migrate; conda run -n detect python manage.py test core.tests.test_image_detection_flow core.tests.test_resource_task_flow; conda run -n detect python manage.py test core.tests; conda run -n detect python manage.py check
items.fallback: Preserve legacy keys like detection_results and fake/normal/pending resource buckets as compatibility fields while introducing a single top-level results contract for image/paper/review tasks.

items.title: Split user frontend upload/history pages into task-specific features and API modules
items.verification: cd AIDetector/code/frontend/frontend-user && npm run type-check; cd AIDetector/code/frontend/frontend-user && npm run build-only
items.fallback: Keep existing routes and shared step widgets intact while moving task-type branching into dedicated feature components and API modules.

items.title: Make admin pages task-type aware with feature modules and split API files
items.verification: conda run -n detect python manage.py migrate; conda run -n detect python manage.py check; conda run -n detect python manage.py test core.tests; cd AIDetector/code/frontend/frontend-admin && npm run type-check; cd AIDetector/code/frontend/frontend-admin && npm run build-only
items.fallback: Additive admin task summary/task list API fields keep old endpoints working while the new frontend reads task_type-aware data through separate tasks/logs/stats modules.

items.title: Only add a thin AI-service adapter if paper/review local entry is unavoidable
items.verification: Repository inspection confirmed paper/review execution stays inside backend service integrations (fastdetect_client/openai_client) without requiring a new ai-service entry; conda run -n detect python manage.py migrate; conda run -n detect python manage.py check; conda run -n detect python manage.py test core.tests
items.fallback: No change needed: keep the existing image ai-service bridge in call_figure_detection.py for image tasks only, and avoid introducing a paper/review adapter until a real runtime gap appears.

items.title: Remove deprecated direct logic after all flows are verified
items.verification: conda run -n detect python manage.py migrate; conda run -n detect python manage.py check; conda run -n detect python manage.py test core.tests; cd AIDetector/code/frontend/frontend-user && npm run type-check && npm run build-only; cd AIDetector/code/frontend/frontend-admin && npm run type-check && npm run build-only
items.fallback: Keep DetectionTask.text_detection_results as a compatibility mirror and keep tasks.py as a thin compatibility wrapper, while removing the unused deprecated user-task endpoint and stale legacy detection submission block remnants from the view layer.

items.title: Emergency runtime hotfix: remove Celery startup from paper/review resource task creation
items.verification: DATABASE_MODE=local LOCAL_DB_NAME=db.sqlite3 conda run -n detect python manage.py check; DATABASE_MODE=local LOCAL_DB_NAME=db.sqlite3 conda run -n detect python manage.py test core.tests.test_resource_task_flow core.tests.test_resource_preprocessing; DATABASE_MODE=local LOCAL_DB_NAME=db.sqlite3 conda run -n detect python manage.py test core.tests
items.fallback: Runtime-only patch layered onto slice-05: resource task creation now always starts paper/review via local on-commit thread execution, while schema, frontend structure, and report/status redesign remain deferred to later slices.

items.title: Emergency runtime hotfix: replace image-report reuse with dedicated paper task reports
items.verification: DATABASE_MODE=local LOCAL_DB_NAME=db.sqlite3 C:\Users\admin\anaconda3\envs\detect\python.exe manage.py migrate; DATABASE_MODE=local LOCAL_DB_NAME=db.sqlite3 C:\Users\admin\anaconda3\envs\detect\python.exe manage.py test core.tests
items.fallback: Keep the hotfix narrow: block non-image subflows from writing DetectionTask.report_file, generate paper/review PDFs from text_detection_results, and let /api/tasks/<id>/report/ regenerate paper/review reports to heal stale broken files.
